content_body:
Located within Noontootla Creek Farms just 20 minutes from downtown Blue Ridge, The Mill offers an inviting Appalachian-inspired dining experience. With a menu rooted in Southern comfort—lunch, appetizers, beer, wine, and ciders—The Mill blends classic flavors with a modern twist.

Open Wednesdays through Saturdays (extended hours on Fridays), it’s an ideal spot to relax after fly fishing, sporting clays, quail hunting, or simply to gather with friends and family in a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Fridays bring extra charm with live music.
title: The Mill at Noontootla Creek Farms
